episode_missing_id.message: The selected podcast episode is missing its identifier.

episode_no_audio.message: Podcast episode {episode_id} has no playable audio URL.

external_media_player_required.message: The target {target} must be an external media player entity.

feed_add_failed.message: The podcast feed could not be added.

feed_connection_failed.message: Home Assistant could not connect to the podcast feed.

feed_http_error.message: The podcast feed server returned an error.

feed_invalid_url.message: The podcast feed URL must start with http:// or https://.

feed_name_ambiguous.message: More than one podcast feed matches {feed_name}: {matches}.

feed_no_audio.message: The feed contains no episodes with playable audio.

feed_no_episodes.message: The feed contains no podcast episodes.

feed_parse_error.message: The podcast feed could not be parsed.

feed_redirect_loop.message: The podcast feed redirected too many times.

feed_refresh_failed.message: Podcast feeds could not be refreshed.

feed_selection_required.message: Select a podcast feed target or provide feed_id or feed_name.

feed_ssl_error.message: Home Assistant could not establish a secure connection to the podcast feed.

feed_timeout.message: The podcast feed server timed out.

feed_too_large.message: The podcast feed exceeds the 10 MB safety limit.

initial_feed_invalid.message: The initial feed is not a playable podcast feed.

initial_feed_invalid_url.message: The initial podcast feed URL is invalid.

initial_feed_unavailable.message: The initial podcast feed is temporarily unavailable. Home Assistant will retry automatically.

invalid_feed_entity_target.message: {entity_id} is not a Podcast Player feed sensor.

media_item_not_playable.message: The selected podcast media item is not playable.

media_player_target_field.message: {service}: The action target selects a podcast feed. Set the output media player using media_player_entity_id.

media_source_path_not_found.message: The podcast media source path was not found.

media_source_playback_failed.message: Podcast playback could not be prepared for {target}.

no_current_episode_to_mark.message: There is no current podcast episode to mark.

no_episode_for_selection.message: No podcast episode is available for the requested selection.

no_episode_to_resume.message: There is no podcast episode available to resume.

no_matching_episode.message: No matching podcast episode was found.

no_media_player_target.message: No podcast media player target is known to stop.

previous_target_stop_failed.message: The previous media player could not be stopped before browser playback started.

proxy_url_unavailable.message: Home Assistant could not create a speaker proxy URL. Configure the Home Assistant internal or external URL.

single_media_player_target.message: Select only one media player target.

target_not_available.message: Media player {target} is not available for podcast playback.

target_pause_failed.message: Media player {target} rejected the pause request.

target_pause_unsupported.message: Media player {target} does not support pausing.

target_playback_failed.message: Media player {target} rejected the podcast audio.

target_resume_failed.message: Media player {target} rejected the resume request.

target_resume_unsupported.message: Media player {target} does not support resuming.

target_session_changed.message: The media player is no longer playing this podcast session. Use force stop to stop it anyway.

target_stop_failed.message: Media player {target} could not be stopped.

target_unavailable_for_action.message: Media player {target} is not available for this action.

user.title: Set up Podcast Player
user.description: Create the Podcast Player integration. You can add a first podcast feed now, or add feeds later from integration options and actions.

data_description.initial_rss_url: Optional. Paste a podcast RSS feed URL to add it during setup.
data_description.refresh_interval_minutes: How often Podcast Player refreshes RSS feeds, in minutes.
data_description.max_episodes_per_feed: How many recent episodes to keep cached per feed. Listening progress is preserved when old cached episodes are trimmed.
data_description.default_playback_speed: Default speed used for podcast playback.
data_description.played_threshold: Fraction of an episode that must be listened to before it is marked played.
data_description.url_mode_preference: Direct sends the original podcast audio URL. Signed proxy uses a temporary Home Assistant URL for media players that cannot reach the original URL.
data_description.enhanced_dlna_controls: Use supported DLNA transport actions for stop, seek, and progress when Home Assistant media-player state does not expose them.

error.cannot_add_feed: Could not add this podcast feed. Check that it is a playable podcast RSS feed and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to this podcast feed. Check the URL and try again.
error.invalid_url: Enter a valid RSS URL starting with http:// or https://.

init.title: Podcast Player options
init.description: Update playback settings, add a podcast feed, or remove an existing feed.

data_description.refresh_interval_minutes: How often Podcast Player refreshes RSS feeds, in minutes.
data_description.max_episodes_per_feed: How many recent episodes to keep cached per feed. Listening progress is preserved when old cached episodes are trimmed.
data_description.default_playback_speed: Default speed used for podcast playback.
data_description.played_threshold: Fraction of an episode that must be listened to before it is marked played.
data_description.url_mode_preference: Direct sends the original podcast audio URL. Signed proxy uses a temporary Home Assistant URL for media players that cannot reach the original URL.
data_description.enhanced_dlna_controls: Use supported DLNA transport actions for stop, seek, and progress when Home Assistant media-player state does not expose them.
data_description.new_feed_url: Optional. Paste a podcast RSS feed URL to add it.
data_description.remove_feed_id: Optional. Choose a feed to remove.
data_description.remove_feed_keep_history: If enabled, episode progress is preserved after the feed is removed.

error.cannot_add_feed: Could not add this podcast feed. Check the URL and try again.
error.feed_not_found: The selected feed could not be found.
error.invalid_url: Enter a valid RSS URL starting with http:// or https://.
error.not_loaded: Podcast Player is not loaded yet. Try again after Home Assistant finishes starting.
